title: Discover Finland’s Fiskars Village Art & Design Biennale
content:
Fiskars Village Art and Design Biennale brings together art, science, architecture and design, 7.6–30.8.2026 in Fiskars, Finland.

The post Discover Finland’s Fiskars Village Art & Design Biennale appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.
